title: Smallest implementation-sufficient; flat 14-doc root; "RT_PHASE_II_PLUS_WORKFLOW_A"

distinctive_mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.
use_value: It preserves the distinctive design logic for Smallest implementation-sufficient; flat 14-doc root; "RT_PHASE_II_PLUS_WORKFLOW_A", so the portfolio can show the actual mechanism and status instead of reducing the project to a file-count or handoff label.
